name: nats_jetstream
summary: Consumes messages from a NATS JetStream stream via a push or pull consumer.

subject.description: Subject to consume from. Must match the stream's subject filter.

durable.description: Durable consumer name. Required for persistent/resumable consumption across restarts.

stream.description: Explicit stream name. If empty, JetStream infers the stream from the subject.

deliver.description: Delivery policy: where to start consuming messages.

max_ack_pending.description: Maximum number of unacknowledged messages in flight.

ack_wait.description: Time limit for message acknowledgement before redelivery (Go duration syntax).
